title: Connection system
abstract: A connection system for a vehicle is operable to couple a running gear system of the vehicle to a vehicle body of the vehicle, the connection system configured to at least partially disconnect the running gear system from the vehicle body when a load on the connection system exceeds a threshold.
claims: Claims Claims 1 . A connection system for a vehicle, the connection system operable to couple a running gear system of the vehicle to a vehicle body of the vehicle, the connection system configured to at least partially disconnect the running gear system from the vehicle body when a load on the connection system exceeds a threshold. 2. A connection system according to claim 1 , wherein the load is a torque acting on the connection system. 3. A connection system according to claim 2, wherein the connection system is configured to permit substantially free relative rotation between the running gear system and the vehicle body when the load exceeds the threshold. 4. A connection system according to any preceding claim, the connection system comprising a first member fixable to the running gear system and a second member fixable to the vehicle body, the first member connected to the second member, the first member configured to at least partially disconnect from the second member when the load exceeds the threshold. 5. A connection system according to claim 4 when dependent on claim 2, wherein the first member is configured to rotate relative to the second member when the load exceeds the threshold. 6. A connection system according to claim 5, further comprising a fluid distribution system operable to, during relative rotation between the first member and the second member, pass fluid between the first member and the second member to thereby pass fluid between the body and the running gear system. 7. A connection system according to claim 5 or 6, wherein the second member surrounds the first member. 8. A connection system according to any of claims 4 to 7, wherein the first member is connected to the second member by a shear pin, the shear pin configured to fail when the load exceeds the threshold to at least partially disconnect the running gear system from the vehicle body. 9. A connection system according to any preceding claim, further comprising a drive shaft operable to connect a drive system of the vehicle body to a drive train of the running gear system. 10. A connection system according to claim 9, wherein the drive shaft is configured to maintain connection between the drive system of the vehicle body and the drive train of the running gear system when the load exceeds the threshold. 1 1 . A running gear system for a vehicle, the running gear system comprising a connection system according to any preceding claim, the connection system fixed to the running gear system, the running gear system further comprising: a track; and a drive train for driving the track to move the vehicle. 12. A vehicle comprising: a running gear system according to claim 1 1 ; and a vehicle body connected to the running gear system by the connection system. 13. A vehicle according to claim 12, the vehicle comprising a v-shaped hull for deflecting a blast. 14. A vehicle according to claim 12 or 13, wherein the vehicle is an unmanned vehicle. 15. A vehicle according to any of claims 12 to 14, wherein the vehicle is a military vehicle.
